title: Uniao dos Palmares Heat Wave
lead: Uniao dos Palmares is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.23. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, scoring 10.0/10 on our severity scale.
body:
The current heat wave in Uniao dos Palmares has brought extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 10.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 63%, and the wind speed is 9.9 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The city's residents are advised to take precautions to stay safe and hydrated during this critical period.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to heat
